color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
1. Data sources
Station workbooks
Pucón and La Poza
Satellite products
validated separately

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2. Provenance and QA
File hashes and station IDs
date repair and units
duplicate / spike flags

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3. Daily Chl-a target
One daily series per station
observed / interpolated / imputed flags
no hidden preprocessing

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
4. Forecast setup
Calendar features
1024-day Chl-a context
horizons 1-30 days

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5. Foundation forecasts
TimesFM and Chronos
point forecasts
q10 / q50 / q90 intervals
current run: univariate Chl-a input

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
6. Evaluation
Horizon errors
observed-only checks
lag diagnostics
threshold and uncertainty metrics

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7. Reproducible outputs
Figures and source tables
reviewer response matrix
manuscript text with supported claims

div.style: color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; font-weight: 650 !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Satellite-inversion validation
index formulas
matchup table
train/test split
retrieval uncertainty
